blockers.description: Human testing required with live Supabase instance — 5 UAT items pending in 01-HUMAN-UAT.md
blockers.workaround: Copy backend/.env.example to backend/.env, fill Supabase credentials, then run npm run dev and execute curl smoke tests from 01-VALIDATION.md

blockers.description: CR-02: Supabase .single() returns PGRST116 error (not null) for not-found rows — getTaskById and deleteTask return 500 instead of 404
blockers.workaround: Fix pattern: use .maybeSingle() instead of .single(), or catch PGRST116 error code and map to null before the controller checks !task

human_actions_pending.action: Create backend/.env from backend/.env.example and add real Supabase credentials
human_actions_pending.context: Required to run the server and execute live API tests

human_actions_pending.action: Create Supabase tasks table with schema from 01-01-PLAN.md Database Schema section
human_actions_pending.context: Table: tasks (id uuid, title text NOT NULL, description text, status boolean default false, created_at timestamptz default now())

human_actions_pending.action: Run 9 smoke tests from .planning/phases/01-backend/01-VALIDATION.md and check each against expected output
human_actions_pending.context: Especially test #7 (GET /tasks/:id not-found) to confirm CR-02 behavior

decisions.decision: Imported SPEC.md and bootstrapped full 4-phase .planning/ structure
decisions.rationale: SPEC was a freeform project spec — converted to GSD ROADMAP with phases derived from GENERATION ORDER (section 36)

decisions.decision: Split phase 01 into 01-01 (foundation) and 01-02 (CRUD layer) — depends_on: ['01-01'], wave: 2
decisions.rationale: Plan checker blocked 10-task single plan; natural split at foundation vs. CRUD logic boundary

decisions.decision: GSD updated from v1.41.2 to v1.42.3 before execution

next_action: Apply CR-01 through CR-04 code review fixes (run /gsd-code-review 01 --fix), then test with live Supabase, then mark phase complete with gsd-sdk query phase.complete 01
context_notes: Phase 01 execution finished cleanly. Both plans ran in worktree isolation and merged successfully. The backend skeleton is production-quality but has 4 code review findings that should be fixed before Phase 02. The most important fix is CR-02 (.single() 404 handling) which causes dead code in the controller.
